---
title: "Matthew Lyle"
subtitle: "Goizueta Term Chair Associate Professor of Accounting"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 14em
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:matthew.lyle@emory.edu
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOUR_ID
    - text: "{{< ai ssrn >}} SSRN"
      href: https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/cf_dev/AbsByAuth.cfm?per_id=YOUR_ID
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/mlyle6
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/YOUR-HANDLE
---

I am the Goizueta Term Chair Associate Professor of Accounting at the [Goizueta Business School](https://goizueta.emory.edu/), Emory University. Before joining Emory in 2022, I was on the faculty of the Kellogg School of Management at Northwestern University.

My research focuses on valuation and value investing, and more broadly on connecting fundamental analysis with quantitative methods, data analytics, and machine learning for prediction and decision-making. My work has appeared in *The Accounting Review*, the *Journal of Financial Economics*, and the *Review of Accounting Studies*.

I hold a Ph.D. in Management from the Rotman School of Management (University of Toronto) and a Ph.D. in Mathematical Finance from the University of Calgary.

## Recent

- *2025* Awarded the Goizueta Foundation Term Chair and the Jordan Research Excellence Award
- *2025* "Valuation and Returns on Stock Return Volatility" published in *The Accounting Review*
- *2026* Invited talks at Florida International University and Hong Kong University
